scripts.generate: mkdir -p src/generated && rm -rf src/generated/core.ts src/generated/caliper.ts && bun x openapi-zod-client ./specs/CoreAPI.yaml -o src/generated/core.ts --template ./templates/zodios-with-endpoints.hbs --group-strategy tag-file --strict-objects --with-docs --export-schemas --export-types && bun x openapi-zod-client ./specs/CaliperAPI.yaml -o src/generated/caliper.ts --template ./templates/zodios-with-endpoints.hbs --group-strategy tag-file --strict-objects --with-docs --export-schemas --export-types
